problem: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics?
mechanism: Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry
hypothesis: What substrate allows silicon-level performance in fully flexible electronics? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Metal-organic. Metal-organic framework with specific pore geometry directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Prototype device testing with 14 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.
